exercises.prompt: ___ escribo un correo a mi jefe. (I'm writing my boss an email.) Which pronoun fits?
A los estudiantes ___ interesa la historia. (The students are interested in history.)
A los niños ___ encanta el parque. (The kids love the park.)
Find and fix the mistake — the fronted indirect object is missing its required pronoun:
exercises.correctSentence: A María le di el libro.

exercises.prompt: Put the words in the correct order:
Rewrite as an affirmative tú command, attaching the pronoun:
exercises.instruction: make it an affirmative tú command with the pronoun attached

exercises.prompt: Match each Spanish sentence to its English meaning:

pairs.left: Le compré un regalo a mi madre.
pairs.right: I bought my mother a gift.

pairs.left: A mí me gusta el café.
Le hablo a ella, no a él.
pairs.right: I'm talking to her, not to him.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blanks with le or les:
exercises.passage: A mi hermano {0} encanta el fútbol, así que siempre {1} regalo entradas para los partidos. A mis padres también {2} gusta ir a verlo con él.
